sections.heading: Song Length Calculator - Calculate Song Duration Instantly
sections.content: Free song length calculator to calculate total duration of songs, playlists, and tracks. Add multiple songs, convert time formats, and estimate song length using BPM.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.

faq.question: What does the Song Length Calculator - Calculate Song Duration Instantly do?
faq.answer: Free song length calculator to calculate total duration of songs, playlists, and tracks. Add multiple songs, convert time formats, and estimate song length using BPM.

faq.question: Is this calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes. Smart Calculator tools are free, work in your browser, and require no signup.
